commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get svc,endpoints -n yanxi-validation 2>&1 | grep -E "baseline|NAME"'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation -l app=sglang-baseline -o wide 2>&1'

sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'POD=$(kubectl --context ohio get pod -n yanxi-validation -l app=sglang-baseline -o jsonpath="{.items[0].metadata.name}"); kubectl --context ohio describe pod $POD -n yanxi-validation 2>&1 | grep -A 5 -E "Readiness|Conditions" | head -30'
